scripts.dev:local: cross-env ADMIN_TOKEN=secret PASSPHRASE=secret DATA_DIR=./data tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.postbuild: cp -r src/db/migrations dist/db/migrations && cp -r src/admin dist/admin
scripts.start: cross-env ADMIN_TOKEN=secret PASSPHRASE=secret DATA_DIR=./data node dist/index.js
scripts.test: cross-env PASSPHRASE=test-passphrase ADMIN_TOKEN=test-admin-token LOG_LEVEL=silent node --import tsx/esm --test src/test/*.test.ts
